---
title: "Neutrinoless Double Beta Decay"
lang: en
subtitle: "Introduction to Neutrino Physics · Lecture 18"
author: "Dmitry V. Naumov"
institute: "Joint Institute for Nuclear Research"
date: "in preparation"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [black, ../../../shared/styles/neutrinohit-reveal.scss]
    logo: ../../../shared/reveal/dvnlogo.png
    html-math-method: mathjax
    include-after-body:
      - text: |
          <script data-external="1" data-context-home="https://neutrinohit.github.io/neutrinophysics/introduction/" data-context-home-label="Course home" src="../../../shared/reveal/neutrinohit-reveal-footer.js"></script>
      - ../../../analytics/cloudflare-web-analytics.html
    embed-resources: false
    slide-number: true
    slide-level: 2
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    toc-title: "Lecture Plan"
    transition: fade
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    margin: 0.06
    center: false
    incremental: false
    chalkboard: false
    preview-links: false
    code-line-numbers: false
    code-copy: true

execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---
